title: ‘Sickening’: Meghalaya CM condemns assault on Manipur woman, Assam transgender person in Delhi park - India Today NE
excerpt: ‘Sickening’: Meghalaya CM condemns assault on Manipur woman, Assam transgender person in Delhi park  India Today NE
city: Malviya Nagar (near Saket District Court Complex), New Delhi
summary: In a park near Saket District Court Complex in Malviya Nagar, a group of men allegedly racially abused and physically assaulted a woman from Manipur and a transgender person from Assam, causing minor injuries while the victims survived and were treated at Safdarjung Hospital.

title: Manipuri woman, Assam transgender friend assaulted near Saket Court, New Delhi - Imphal Times
excerpt: Manipuri woman, Assam transgender friend assaulted near Saket Court, New Delhi  Imphal Times
city: South Delhi (Malviya Nagar, near Saket District Court Complex)
summary: A Manipuri woman and her transgender friend from Assam were allegedly assaulted by a group of youths near a park close to the Saket District Court Complex in South Delhi after racially abusive remarks, causing minor injuries and prompting registration of a criminal case with one juvenile apprehended.

title: Delhi: After Transgenders ‘Brutally Assaulted’ by Cops, Activist Demands an FIR - NewsClick
excerpt: Delhi: After Transgenders ‘Brutally Assaulted’ by Cops, Activist Demands an FIR  NewsClick
summary: Allegedly, police personnel forcibly picked up a transgender person and later brutally assaulted and sexually harassed inmates of a shelter home, with a related incident captured in a viral livestream and leading to demands for an FIR.

title: Story of indomitable will - The Hindu
summary: A policeman is depicted cruelly treating a eunuch who begs at a red light in Delhi, allegedly taking money by force.
